helpers.name: page
helpers.description: Creates a link to the page.

helpers.name: pluralize
helpers.description: Transforms the word into singular or plural forms.

helpers.name: trans
helpers.description: Translates texts to the current store language.

filters.name: asset
filters.description: Creates links to Salla's theme files.

filters.name: camel_case
filters.description: Replaces punctations and spaces with letters in uppercase.

filters.name: cdn
filters.description: Retrives links of pre-defined files such as `font` and `saicon`.

filters.name: date
filters.description: Displays the dates in the current page language.

filters.name: is_placeholder
filters.description: Checks if image url is placeholder or image.

filters.name: kebab_case
filters.description: Replaces the spaces with a dash.

filters.name: snake_case
filters.description: Replaces spaces in texts with underscore and keeps first letter in lowercase.

filters.name: studly_case
filters.description: Capilaizes first letters in each subword.

filters.name: time_ago
filters.description: Shows the time of and action execution.
